tasks.title: Expand ~ in queue/done/workspace paths to avoid mislocated workspaces
evidence: code: crates/ralph/src/config.rs:359-390 treats paths as absolute only via Path::is_absolute (tilde not expanded)
code: crates/ralph/src/git/workspace.rs:30-39 joins relative workspace_root onto repo_root
plan: Introduce a shared path-normalization helper that expands leading `~` to HOME.
Apply it to queue.file, queue.done_file, and parallel.workspace_root resolution.
Add tests for `~` expansion to ensure paths resolve to the home directory.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph config_*` (or specific new tests) and confirming they pass.

tasks.title: Validate parallel.branch_prefix with git ref rules
evidence: code: crates/ralph/src/config.rs:272-277 only rejects empty branch_prefix
code: crates/ralph/src/git/workspace.rs:64-89 uses branch_prefix in git checkout -B
plan: Add validation for branch_prefix using git ref rules (e.g., `git check-ref-format --branch`).
Provide a clear error message pointing to parallel.branch_prefix when invalid.
Add tests for invalid prefixes (spaces, '..', '@{').
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph config_*` and confirming tests pass.

tasks.title: Persist merge blockers when merge runner detects PR head mismatch
evidence: code: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/merge_runner.rs:210-219 logs head mismatch and returns without updating state
code: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:264-285 only skips PRs when merge_blocker is set
plan: Extend merge runner to report head mismatches back to the supervisor (e.g., new MergeResult field or callback).
Persist merge_blocker in state.json when a head mismatch is detected.
Add tests covering head mismatch -> merge_blocker set -> subsequent runs skip the PR without repeated warnings.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph parallel_*` and confirming the new test passes.

tasks.title: Update docs to use --parallel (not --parallel-workers) for queue stop
evidence: docs: docs/cli.md:1118 lists `ralph run loop --parallel-workers N` but CLI flag is --parallel
plan: Replace the outdated `--parallel-workers` flag with `--parallel` in the queue stop documentation.
Search the docs for any other `parallel-workers` mentions and update them.
Verify by running `rg -n "parallel-workers" docs/cli.md` and confirming no matches remain.

tasks.title: Preflight origin-remote check before spawning parallel workers
evidence: code: crates/ralph/src/git/workspace.rs:192-202 bails when origin is missing
code: crates/ralph/src/git/workspace.rs:74-83 calls origin_urls during workspace creation
plan: Add a parallel-mode preflight that checks for a pushable origin remote before any worker is spawned.
Return a clear error message suggesting how to add origin or disable parallel mode.
Add a test that runs parallel mode in a repo without origin and asserts early failure.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph parallel_*` and confirming the new test passes.

tasks.title: Prevent workspace_root-in-repo from leaving the repo dirty across runs
evidence: code: crates/ralph/src/git/workspace.rs:30-39 allows relative workspace_root inside repo_root
code: crates/ralph/src/git/clean.rs:25-30 allowed dirty paths exclude workspace directories
plan: Add validation/warning when workspace_root is under repo_root and not gitignored, or auto-add a gitignore entry.
Update docs/configuration to discourage in-repo workspace roots unless ignored.
Add a test that sets workspace_root to .ralph/workspaces and asserts the preflight behavior (warning/error or gitignore update).
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph parallel_*` (and checking .gitignore if modified).

tasks.title: Use queue repair for parallel task selection to avoid aborting on minor JSON errors
plan: Switch parallel task selection to load the queue with repair + validation (consistent with other repair-friendly paths).
Add a test where queue.json has trailing commas and parallel selection still succeeds.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph parallel_*` and confirming the new test passes.
